summary: Completed testing of CRM role-based visibility modifications and sidebar responsive behavior. Successfully verified all 4 required features: admin Toborzó column/filter visibility, recruiter Toborzó column/filter hiding, and sidebar visibility at full screen width.
passed_tests: ✅ Admin login successful with admin@test.hu - can access /workers page
✅ Admin can see 'Toborzó' filter dropdown in filters section (data-testid='owner-filter' visible)
✅ Admin can see 'Toborzó' column in table headers (7th column header shows 'Toborzó')
✅ Recruiter login successful with toborzo@test.hu - can access /workers page
✅ Recruiter cannot see 'Toborzó' filter dropdown (correctly hidden for recruiters)
✅ Recruiter cannot see 'Toborzó' column in table headers (correctly hidden for recruiters)
✅ Sidebar visible at 1920px width for both admin and recruiter users
✅ Sidebar responsive behavior working: visible at 1920px, 1440px, 1024px, 768px breakpoints
✅ Sidebar breakpoint change from lg: (1024px) to md: (768px) working correctly
✅ Mobile hamburger menu functionality working at smaller screen sizes
success_percentage: frontend: 100% (all 4 required features verified working perfectly)
